acceptance_targets: [ch10_f001] PASS if a reader can trace one coherent museum-area-to-Sunset-Park trip from the named transit line(s) and stop names in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:343 without an impossible jump; FAIL if the same single route still cannot reach the stated destination.

[ch10_f002] PASS if the revised passage gives a clear, explicit movement path for the blue chip from the chapter-09 end state to its chapter-10 use, with no contradictory implication of continuous locker storage; FAIL if both states still coexist without explanation.

[ch10_f003] PASS if Marisol uses contractions in at least 4 of her next 5 defensive replies anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:97, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:101, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:113, and any uncontracted form is clearly motivated by emphasis; FAIL if unmotivated formal full forms remain the default in that exchange.

[ch10_f004] PASS if each of the four speakers has at least one line in those spans that cannot be swapped to another without obvious lexical/rhythmic mismatch; FAIL if two or more still read as interchangeable policy voice.

[ch10_f005] PASS if the revised chapter retains no more than one 'as if' explanatory clause across the cited spans and preserves equivalent scene clarity; FAIL if multiple formulaic 'as if' clauses still cluster in those locations.

[ch10_f006] PASS if Ada's message/conversation states at least one concrete boundary condition at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:331 or adjacent dialogue, and Marisol's response includes at least two observable physical reactions around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:333; FAIL if the breakup information remains only a generic distance phrase.

[FBR-C01-005] Pass if the first paragraph no longer uses a 'By the time' transit-weather launch and establishes suspension conflict within the opening lines; fail if the chapter still starts with the same commuter template.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a reader can trace one coherent museum-area-to-Sunset-Park trip from the named transit line(s) and stop names in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:343 without an impossible jump; FAIL if the same single route still cannot reach the stated destination.
findings.problem: Transit geography breaks plausibility: Marisol boards the B41, the narration tracks Flatbush-corridor stops, then lands her at a Sunset Park stop on the same ride. In contemporary realistic Brooklyn, that route sequence is spatially inconsistent and violates the continuity/world-rule requirement for physical plausibility.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the commute block at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:343 so the line/stops and destination are on a single plausible path (or explicitly show a transfer). Keep the observational beats, but anchor them to a real route that can end in Sunset Park.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage gives a clear, explicit movement path for the blue chip from the chapter-09 end state to its chapter-10 use, with no contradictory implication of continuous locker storage; FAIL if both states still coexist without explanation.
findings.problem: Object-state continuity drifts on the blue day-one chip. The chapter states she 'found' it in her museum cubby and implies habitual locker storage (wrapped in tissue), which conflicts with the prior boundary state where the chip was on top of the roof-garden cassette in her apartment at chapter end.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:309 (and nearby lines where needed), reconcile object movement explicitly: either show she brought the chip from home that morning, or keep it with the apartment cassette and remove locker retrieval language that implies long-term storage there.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if Marisol uses contractions in at least 4 of her next 5 defensive replies anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:97, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:101, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:113, and any uncontracted form is clearly motivated by emphasis; FAIL if unmotivated formal full forms remain the default in that exchange.
findings.problem: Marisol's speech drifts toward formal legal diction at peak pressure, including repeated uncontracted forms ('I did not...') despite a high-contraction profile and stress pattern that should sound sharper and less institutional. This blurs her idiolect against the room's policy register.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Marisol's defensive lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:69, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:73, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:177 so contractions and her sharper private stress texture dominate, reserving any full-form phrasing for explicit emphasis. Keep content identical; shift cadence/register.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each of the four speakers has at least one line in those spans that cannot be swapped to another without obvious lexical/rhythmic mismatch; FAIL if two or more still read as interchangeable policy voice.
findings.problem: Institutional voices partially collapse into one compliance register. Genevieve, Nora, Elliot, and Maya all default to similar polished legal-operational syntax, which reduces idiolect separation and makes several lines speaker-swappable.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate speaker texture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:55, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:125, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:263: legal counsel should remain statutory/procedural, Nora should carry curator-fatigue + institutional triage, Genevieve should sound donor-facing but personal, and Maya should stay HR-script clipped.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter retains no more than one 'as if' explanatory clause across the cited spans and preserves equivalent scene clarity; FAIL if multiple formulaic 'as if' clauses still cluster in those locations.
findings.problem: A recurring explanatory simile construction ('as if ...') appears more than twice and becomes a detectable prose tic. The repetition flattens surprise and signals formula instead of scene-specific pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:25, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:341, convert most 'as if' clauses to direct sensory or action-based description. Keep only the single strongest clause if desired.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if Ada's message/conversation states at least one concrete boundary condition at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:331 or adjacent dialogue, and Marisol's response includes at least two observable physical reactions around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:333; FAIL if the breakup information remains only a generic distance phrase.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift in the Ada rupture beat: the break is deferred into a generic distance text ('Need distance for now') without concrete boundary terms, softening a high-pressure relational consequence into euphemistic abstraction. This is also timidity, because the prose retreats from the physical/emotional reality already established.
findings.rewrite_direction: Deepen the separation beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:303, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:304, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:329, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:331, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:333 by specifying what distance means (contact limits, duration, or condition) and grounding Marisol's reaction in immediate bodily detail rather than interpretive blur.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the first paragraph no longer uses a 'By the time' transit-weather launch and establishes suspension conflict within the opening lines; fail if the chapter still starts with the same commuter template.
findings.problem: Cross-chapter style consistency drift: this chapter repeats the same 'By the time Marisol...' commuter-weather entry scaffold used repeatedly elsewhere, flattening chapter texture and violating prose_style_profile chapter-variance intent.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3270-3274 to open inside immediate suspension machinery (security block, conference-room preamble, or document handoff) instead of transit recap; keep rent/stipend pressure but move it after scene ignition.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
